Cadetia, specifically Cadetia latifolia, is a genus of flowering plants in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, and its health benefits are associated with its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of Cadetia include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Cadetia is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
